terraformregistries.description: A group representing a Terraform registry provider (e.g., registry.terraform.io).

providers.description: A Terraform provider. The resource ID is encoded as namespace~type (e.g., hashicorp~aws).

namespace.description: The namespace (owner) of the provider on the Terraform Registry (e.g., hashicorp).

type.description: The type identifier of the provider (e.g., aws).

downloads.description: Total cumulative download count from the Terraform Registry.

tier.description: Provider tier: official, partner, or community.

logo_url.description: URL to the provider's logo image.

categories.description: Categories that describe the provider's purpose.

featured.description: Whether the provider is featured on the Terraform Registry.

unlisted.description: Whether the provider is unlisted on the Terraform Registry.

warning.description: Optional deprecation or warning message from the registry.

aliases.description: Alternate source addresses for this provider.

modules.description: A Terraform module. The resource ID is encoded as namespace~name~provider (e.g., hashicorp~consul~aws).

namespace.description: The namespace (owner) of the module on the Terraform Registry.

provider.description: The provider system this module targets (e.g., aws).

downloads.description: Total cumulative download count from the Terraform Registry.

verified.description: Whether the module is verified by HashiCorp.

trusted.description: Whether the module publisher is trusted.

owner.description: GitHub username or organisation that owns the module repository.
